name: Gravity falls
description: so ive noticed, that there is not ANY gravity falls bots. well, no normal ones at least. so ive taken the responsibility to make one, that doesnt force you to be a specific gender or role! so you could be... anyone. plus it’d be a fun RPG. and if its possible, could yall perhaps comment ideas on what kind of bots to make? like bots that you dont see enough of! for example... your favourite cartoon has a few bots, but theyre all sloppy and badly written smut, comment the name and ill make a gender neutral, third person bot or rpg.
creator: Judge_holden
